Truth or Dare (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $41,411,015Details
International Box Office $53,881,729
Worldwide Box Office $95,292,744
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,256,314
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $39,200
Total $1,295,514
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$18,667,855 (45.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.22 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:43.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$3,500,000 (worldwide box office is 27.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,029 opening theaters/3,068 max. theaters, 4.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $54,366,165

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 13th, 2018 (Wide) by Universal

Genre:Thriller/Suspense

Production/Financing Companies: Blumhouse
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
